title: The Pentagon
summary: The first Episode 2 main mission inside the besieged Pentagon, where Agents investigate Black Tusk's search for strategic resources.

claims.text: The Pentagon is one of two Episode 2 main missions following an introductory Pentagon Breach mission.
Black Tusk places the Pentagon under siege and becomes the first outside force to enter after its post-outbreak lockdown.
The wider Episode 2 operation has Agents secure a perfusion bioreactor needed for antiviral production.

paragraphs.text: Agents enter a storm-damaged Pentagon to learn what Black Tusk is seeking and prevent the faction from converting the site's strategic resources into an advantage over SHD.

verification.notes: Pentagon Breach is acknowledged but will receive its own record only after direct objective capture.
